text:
Ludwig is hosting a new event called The Streamer Games in August, which will see content creators compete in various athletics sports.

YouTubecontent creator Ludwig has definitely caughtOlympicsfever, with plans to commentate on one of its most bizarre sports: chessboxing.

A week later and the YouTuber has announced his own spin on the sporting event, called The Streamer Games.

Ludwig has rounded up streamers and influencers from eight different organisation within the creator sphere, fromTwitchto Podcasters, who’ll compete in various athletics sports.

With Red Bull as a sponsor, Ludwig has rented an athletics field at a high school in Los Angeles, where the event will be held August 17 and 18.

During a recent stream, Ludwig said that each of the events will last about six hours, and based on the announcement trailer participants will compete in sports such as hammer throw, ribbon dancing, dodgeball, and long jumping.

Sign up to theGameCentral newsletterfor a unique take on the week in gaming, alongside the latest reviews and more. Delivered to your inbox every Saturday morning.

It wouldn’t be at all surprising if Ludwig adds a few twists on these traditional Olympic sports, however, to make his show more interesting to fans.

There are eight teams that will compete against each other, which are: YouTube, Twitch, Red Bull, Podcasters, and influencer organisations OTK, 100 Thieves, FaZe Clan, and Offline TV.

imagine if i forced a bunch of gamers and streamers to compete in track and field events lolanyway see you august 17-18 ð¥pic.twitter.com/AO5OQXkZzl

Ludwig has yet to confirm which influencers will participate, but has promised to announce two of the teams very soon.

Based on the teams that have been mentioned though, it would make sense if Pokimane and/or Disguised Toast from Offline TV join the games.

OTK have Mizkif, Emiru, and Sodapoppin on its roster, who might take part. While Nadeshot or Valkyrae could compete under the 100 Thieves banner.

Who competes for Twitch, YouTube, Red Bull, and Podcasters is anyone’s guess, but Ludwig will want to get as many stars as possible to join.

The Streamer Games will be broadcast live onLudwig’s YouTube channelas well as on his Mogul Moves Twitch stream.

The event starts at 1am UK time on August 17, as mentioned earlier.

title: YouTube star Ludwig announces his own Olympics with fellow streamers | Metro News
description: YouTuber Ludwig will host his latest invention, The Streamer Games, where a host of influencers will compete in sports such as dodgeball.
